payload.answer: Denied. A normal user command attempting to run administrative SQL such as deleting memory cards is not authorized. No memory was deleted or changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user and should not be executed or stored as durable memory.

details: No memory cards created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Use authorized administrative tooling with appropriate permissions.
If this was a test, verify that no durable memory changes occurred.
